item.title: Nikon NEXIV VMF-K6561 Measuring System
item.description: Nikon launches the NEXIV VMF-K6561, the latest addition to its 3D Confocal series.

item.title: Europe's Machine Vision Future: Insights from Industry Leaders
item.description: European leaders emphasize partnerships and breaking silos for machine vision innovation and competitiveness.

item.title: Zeiss Integrates MVTec HALCON into Blockwise for Next-Generation Automated Microscopy
item.description: Zeiss and MVTec collaborate to integrate HALCON software into Zeiss automated microscopy systems.

item.title: Nikon Introduces Large-Stage Optical Measurement System for Advanced Packaging
item.description: Nikon expands its NEXIV 3D Confocal series with a new system for large-format advanced packaging measurement.

item.title: AI Is Getting Funded. ROI Still Has to Be Earned: How Manufacturers Can Break Through
item.description: Insights on how manufacturers can achieve commercial ROI from their machine vision and AI defect detection investments.

item.title: Techman Robot Selects NVIDIA Isaac Sim to Optimize Automated Optical Inspection - NVIDIA Blog
item.description: Techman Robot partners with NVIDIA, leveraging advanced simulation tools to enhance and market their commercial automated optical inspection systems.

item.title: KLINGELNBERG Unveils Smart Tracing To Bring Data-Driven Transparency To CNC Manufacturing
item.description: A new commercial data-driven metrology solution aims to bring greater transparency and efficiency to CNC manufacturing processes.
